comments.comment: In 2021 Karve updated the methodology for fugitive emissions screening on an annual and triannual basis retaining a 3rd party service provider to complete optical gas-imaging on all sites, which is now being captured in our reporting and impacting our total air source emissions. (Improving our methodology)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The 2023 calculation methodology applied a speciation to the total vented volume for a limited number of components and the VOC was calculated as the total sum of those components. The 2024 calculation methodology calculates the mass of VOC using a VOC mass fraction and molecular weight calculated from a sample point, then applies the speciations to the mass of VOC. The updated approach considers more components for calculating VOC than the prior 2023 approach.
